title: Techno Bird
content: In the latest article I explained how to use matrices to make 3D scenes. A couple of days later, I realized that it would be a good idea to create an additional interactive demo for my students. And here it is. I don't know if this thing has its own name in programming or mathematics, but I call it "techno bird". This variation of it is written in VanillaJS and GLSL and works in all modern browsers. At least it should, I haven't tested it really. Its main purpose is to illustrate the principles from my article, so if it works in Chrome - it's enough.
